responses: You can check the events on the Events page.
Our college is organizing several events. I can show you the list.
The fee depends on the event. You can check it in the events section.
Each event has a different registration fee.
Please check the event details page for fee information.
You can see the event details including date and venue on the events page.
Each event has its own date and venue listed in the event section.
Check the events page for full details about each event.
To register, go to the events page, select an event, and click register.
Open the events section and fill the registration form.
You can register for an event by clicking the register button.
Let me check the categories for that event.
Hello! I am your Eventopia assistant.
